ast.source: The Sapling is defeated when they take any damage. For every 6 damage a PC deals to the Sapling, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 树苗受到任何伤害即被击败。玩家角色每对树苗造成6点伤害，就在攻击范围内额外击败一个该攻击会命中的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to choose a target and spotlight all Treant Saplings within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 8 physical damage each. Combine this damage.
ast.target: 消耗1点恐惧，选择一个目标，并将所有处于其近距离内的树精树苗置于聚光灯下。这些爪牙移动至目标的近战范围内，进行一次共享的攻击掷骰。成功时，每个爪牙造成8点物理伤害。合并此伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A captivating undead dressed in aristocratic finery.
ast.target: 一位身着贵族华服、引人注目的亡灵。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Vampire makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当吸血鬼成功发动攻击时，所有处于远距离内的玩家角色失去1点希望，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A creature who moves into Melee range of the Vampire must make an Instinct Reaction Roll. On a failure, you gain 1d4 Fear.
ast.target: 一个生物进入吸血鬼的近战范围时，必须进行一次本能反应掷骰。失败时，你获得1d4点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Vampire is within Melee range of an ally, they can cause the ally to mark a HP. The Vampire then clears a HP.
ast.target: 当吸血鬼处于盟友的近战范围内时，它可以导致该盟友标记1点生命值。吸血鬼随后清除1点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend 2 Fear to summon 1d4 Vampires, who appear at Far range and immediately take the spotlight.
ast.target: 消耗2点恐惧，召唤1d4个吸血鬼，他们出现在远距离并立即获得聚光灯。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Vampire is spotlighted, roll a d8. On a result of 6 or higher, all targets within Very Close range must mark a HP.
ast.target: 当吸血鬼被置于聚光灯下时，掷一个d8。结果为6或更高时，极近距离内的所有目标必须标记1点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An intelligent undead with blood-stained lips and a predator's smile.
ast.target: 一个拥有血染双唇和掠食者般微笑的智慧亡灵。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, deal 5d4 physical damage. A target who marks HP from this attack loses a Hope and must mark a Stress. The Vampire then clears a HP.
ast.target: 对近战范围内的一个目标发动攻击。成功时，造成5d4点物理伤害。因此次攻击而标记生命值的目标失去1点希望，并必须标记1点压力。吸血鬼随后清除1点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Vampire takes physical damage, you can spend a Fear to take half damage.
ast.target: 当吸血鬼受到物理伤害时，你可以消耗1点恐惧，使伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A boxy, dust-covered construct with thick metallic swinging doors on their torso.
ast.target: 一个布满灰尘的方形构装体，躯干上有厚重的金属摆动门。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Creatures within Melee range of the Gaoler have disadvantage on attack rolls against them. Creatures trapped inside the Gaoler are immune to this feature.
ast.target: 处于狱卒近战范围内的生物对它的攻击掷骰具有劣势。被困在狱卒内部的生物不受此特性影响。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, the target is Restrained within the Gaoler until freed with a successful Strength Roll (18). While Restrained, the target can only attack the Gaoler.
ast.target: 标记1点压力，对极近距离内的一个目标发动攻击。成功时，目标被束缚在狱卒内部，直到通过一次成功的（18）力量检定被解救。在束缚状态下，目标只能攻击狱卒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A dust-covered golden construct with boxy limbs and a huge mace for a hand.
ast.target: 一个布满灰尘的金色构装体，拥有方形的四肢和一只巨大的钉头锤作为手臂。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Targets who take damage from the Sentinel's standard attack are knocked back to Very Close range.
ast.target: 被哨兵标准攻击命中的目标会被击退至极近距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to choose a target within Very Close range to focus on. That target has disadvantage on attack rolls when they're within Very Close range of the Sentinel. The Sentinel can only focus on one target at a time.
ast.target: 标记1点压力，选择极近距离内的一个目标作为焦点。当该目标处于哨兵的极近距离内时，其攻击掷骰具有劣势。哨兵一次只能聚焦于一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to lob explosive magic at a point within Far range. All targets within Very Close range of that point must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 2d8+20 magic damage and are knocked back to Close range. Targets who succeed take half damage and aren't knocked back.
ast.target: 消耗1点恐惧，向远距离内的一点投掷爆炸性魔法。该点极近距离内的所有目标必须进行一次敏捷反应掷骰。失败的目标受到2d8+20点魔法伤害，并被击退至近距离。成功的目标受到一半伤害且不会被击退。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Sentinel makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当哨兵成功攻击一个玩家角色时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A massive living turret with reinforced armor and twelve pistondriven mechanical legs.
ast.target: 一个巨大的活体炮台，拥有强化装甲和十二条活塞驱动的机械腿。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When you spotlight the Turret and they don't have a token on their stat block, they can't make a standard attack. Place a token on their stat block and describe what they're preparing to do. When you spotlight the Turret and they have a token on their stat block, clear the token and they can attack.
ast.target: 当你将炮台置于聚光灯下且其状态栏上没有标记时，它无法进行标准攻击。在其状态栏上放置一个标记，并描述它正在准备做什么。当你将炮台置于聚光灯下且其状态栏上有标记时，清除标记，它便可以攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to Mark a target within Far range until the Turret is destroyed or the Marked target becomes Hidden. While the target is Marked, their Evasion is halved.
ast.target: 消耗1点恐惧，标记远距离内的一个目标，直到炮台被摧毁或被标记的目标进入隐匿状态。当目标被标记时，其闪避值减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When another adversary deals damage to a target within Far range of the Turret, you can mark a Stress to add the Turret's standard attack damage to the damage roll.
ast.target: 当另一个对手对炮台远距离内的一个目标造成伤害时，你可以标记1点压力，将炮台的标准攻击伤害加到伤害掷骰中。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Turret is destroyed, they explode. All targets within Close range must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 3d20 physical damage. Targets who succeed take half damage.
ast.target: 当炮台被摧毁时，它会爆炸。近距离内的所有目标必须进行一次敏捷反应掷骰。失败的目标受到3d20点物理伤害。成功的目标受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A glacier-blue dragon with four powerful limbs and frost-tinged wings.
ast.target: 一头冰川蓝色的巨龙，拥有四条强健的肢体和带有霜气的双翼。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Dragon can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 巨龙在每个GM回合中最多可被置于聚光灯下三次。照常消耗恐惧来将其置于聚光灯下。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If a target damaged by the Dragon doesn't mark an Armor Slot to reduce the damage, they must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 如果被巨龙伤害的目标没有标记护甲槽来减少伤害，他们必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC rolls with Fear while within Far range of the Dragon, they lose a Hope.
ast.target: 当一名PC在龙的远距离范围内掷出恐惧时，他们失去一点希望。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a creature makes a successful attack against the Dragon from within Very Close range, they must mark a Stress and become Chilled until their next rest or they clear a Stress. While they are Chilled, they have disadvantage on attack rolls.
ast.target: 当一个生物在极近距离内对龙发起成功的攻击时，他们必须标记一点压力，并在下次休息或清除一点压力之前获得寒冷状态。在寒冷状态下，他们的攻击检定具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Dragon makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当龙对一名PC发起成功的攻击时，你获得一点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A decaying mage adorned in dark, tattered robes.
ast.target: 一个身着破旧深色长袍的腐朽法师。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to spotlight 1d4 allies. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage, or full damage if you spend a Fear.
ast.target: 标记一点压力以聚光1d4名盟友。他们在此聚光状态下进行的攻击造成半伤，或者如果你花费一点恐惧，则造成全伤。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark 2 Stress to cause all targets within Far range to make a Strength Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 2d20+12 magic damage and you gain a Fear. Targets who succeed take half damage. A target who marks 2 or more HP must also mark 2 Stress and becomes Vulnerable until they roll with Hope.
ast.target: 标记两点压力，使远距离内的所有目标进行一次力量反应检定。失败的目标受到2d20+12点魔法伤害，你获得一点恐惧。成功的目标受到半伤。标记了2点或更多生命值的目标还必须标记两点压力，并在掷出希望之前处于易伤状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to summon a Zombie Legion, which appears at Close range and immediately takes the spotlight.
ast.target: 花费一点恐惧召唤一支僵尸军团，它出现在近距离并立即获得聚光。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Necromancer has marked 7 or more of their HP, you can spend a Fear to have them teleport away to a safe location to recover. A PC who succeeds on an Instinct Roll can trace the teleportation magic to their destination.
ast.target: 当死灵法师已标记7点或更多生命值时，你可以花费一点恐惧让他们传送到一个安全地点恢复。一名PC若在本能检定上成功，可以追踪传送魔法找到他们的目的地。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Countdown (Loop 2d6). When the Necromancer has marked 6 or more of their HP, activate the countdown. When it triggers, deal 2d10+6 direct magic damage to a target within Close range. The Necromancer then clears a number of Stress or HP equal to the number of HP marked by the target from this attack.
ast.target: 倒计时（循环2d6）。当死灵法师已标记6点或更多生命值时，激活倒计时。当它触发时，对近距离内的一个目标造成2d10+6点直接魔法伤害。死灵法师随后清除等于该目标因此次攻击所标记生命值数量的压力或生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A cursed soul bound to the Fallen's will.
ast.target: 一个被束缚于堕落者意志的受诅灵魂。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Shock Troop is defeated when they take any damage. For every 12 damage a PC deals to the Shock Troop, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 冲击兵在受到任何伤害时被击败。PC每对冲击兵造成12点伤害，就额外击败一个在攻击成功范围内的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC marks HP from an attack by the Shock Troop, they lose a Hope.
ast.target: 当一名PC因冲击兵的攻击而标记生命值时，他们失去一点希望。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to choose a target and spotlight all Fallen Shock Troops within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 12 physical damage each. Combine this damage.
ast.target: 花费一点恐惧，选择一个目标并聚光其近距离内所有堕落冲击兵。这些爪牙移动到目标的近战距离内，并进行一次共享攻击检定。若成功，它们各自造成12点物理伤害。合并此伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A powerful mage bound by the bargains they made in life.
ast.target: 一个被生前契约所束缚的强大法师。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to unleash an all-consuming firestorm and make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Sorcerer succeeds against take 2d10+6 direct magic damage.
ast.target: 花费一点恐惧释放一场吞噬一切的火风暴，并对近距离内的所有目标进行一次攻击。术士成功命中的目标受到2d10+6点直接魔法伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to trap a target within Far range in a powerful illusion of their worst fears. While trapped, the target is Restrained and Vulnerable until they break free, ending both conditions, with a successful Instinct Roll.
ast.target: 标记一点压力，将远距离内的一个目标困在他们最深恐惧的强大幻象中。被困期间，目标处于束缚和易伤状态，直到他们通过一次成功的本能检定挣脱，结束这两种状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Sorcerer takes damage from an attack, they can teleport up to Far range.
ast.target: 当术士受到攻击伤害时，他们可以传送至远距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A Fallen God, wreathed in rage and resentment, bearing millennia of experience in breaking heroes' spirits.
ast.target: 一位堕落之神，被愤怒与怨恨所环绕，拥有数千年粉碎英雄意志的经验。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Realm-Breaker can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 破界者每回合可被GM聚光最多两次。照常花费恐惧来聚光他们。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Realm-Breaker takes damage, reduce it by 2d10.
ast.target: 当破界者受到伤害时，减少2d10点伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to make a standard attack against all targets within Very Close range. When a target uses armor to reduce damage from this attack, they must mark 2 Armor Slots.
ast.target: 标记一点压力，对极近距离内的所有目标进行一次标准攻击。当目标使用护甲来减少此攻击伤害时，他们必须标记两个护甲槽。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a target marks HP from an attack by the Realm-Breaker, all PCs within Far range of the target must lose a Hope.
ast.target: 当一个目标因破界者的攻击而标记生命值时，该目标远距离内的所有PC必须失去一点希望。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Realm-Breaker marks their last HP, replace them with the Undefeated Champion and immediately spotlight them.
ast.target: 当破界者标记其最后一点生命值时，用不败勇士替换他们，并立即聚光不败勇士。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: That which only the most feared have a chance to fear.
ast.target: 唯有最令人畏惧之物，才可能令其感到恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Undefeated Champion can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 不败勇士每回合可被GM聚光最多三次。照常花费恐惧来聚光他们。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Undefeated Champion takes damage, reduce it by 1d10.
ast.target: 当不败勇士受到伤害时，减少1d10点伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to make a standard attack against all targets within Very Close range. PCs the Champion succeeds against lose a number of Hope equal to the HP they marked from this attack.
ast.target: 标记一点压力，对极近距离内的所有目标进行一次标准攻击。勇士成功命中的PC失去等于他们因此次攻击所标记生命值数量的希望。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to summon a number of Fallen Shock Troops equal to twice the number of PCs. The Shock Troops appear at Far range.
ast.target: 花费一点恐惧，召唤数量等于PC两倍的堕落冲击兵。冲击兵出现在远距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Undefeated Champion makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当不败勇士对一名PC发起成功的攻击时，你获得一点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a target marks HP from an attack by the Undefeated Champion, all PCs within Far range of the target lose a Hope.
ast.target: 当一个目标因不败勇士的攻击而标记生命值时，该目标远距离内的所有PC失去一点希望。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spirit soldiers with sanctified bows.
ast.target: 配备圣化弓箭的灵魂士兵。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Archer deals double damage to targets marked Guilty by a High Seraph.
ast.target: 弓箭手对被高级炽天使标记为有罪的目标造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to make a standard attack against up to three targets.
ast.target: 标记一点压力，对最多三个目标进行一次标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Souls of the faithful, lifted up with divine weaponry.
ast.target: 虔诚信徒的灵魂，被神圣武器所升华。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Soldier is defeated when they take any damage. For every 13 damage a PC deals to the Soldier, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 圣兵在受到任何伤害时被击败。PC每对圣兵造成13点伤害，就额外击败一个在攻击成功范围内的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the Soldier is flying, spend a Fear to move up to Far range instead of Close range before taking an action.
ast.target: 当圣兵飞行时，花费一点恐惧可在行动前移动至远距离而非近距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to choose a target and spotlight all Hallowed Soldiers within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 10 physical damage each. Combine this damage.
ast.target: 花费一点恐惧，选择一个目标并聚光其近距离内所有神圣圣兵。这些爪牙移动到目标的近战距离内，并进行一次共享攻击检定。若成功，它们各自造成10点物理伤害。合并此伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A divine champion, head of a hallowed host of warriors who enforce their god's will.
ast.target: 一位神圣的冠军，统率着一支执行其神明意志的神圣战士军团。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Seraph can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 炽天使每回合可被GM聚光最多三次。照常花费恐惧来聚光他们。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the Seraph is flying, spend a Fear to move up to Far range instead of Close range before taking an action.
ast.target: 当炽天使飞行时，花费一点恐惧可在行动前移动至远距离而非近距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to reflect a sliver of divinity as a searing beam of light that hits up to twenty targets within Very Far range. Targets must make a Presence Reaction Roll, with disadvantage if they are marked Guilty. Targets who fail take 4d6+12 magic damage. Targets who succeed take half damage.
ast.target: 标记一点压力，将一丝神性反射为一道灼热的光束，命中极远距离内最多二十个目标。目标必须进行一次存在感反应检定，若被标记为有罪则具有劣势。失败的目标受到4d6+12点魔法伤害。成功的目标受到半伤。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per scene, spend a Fear to spotlight all other adversaries within Far range. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage.
ast.target: 每场景一次，花费一点恐惧聚光远距离内所有其他对手。他们在此聚光状态下进行的攻击造成半伤。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A legendary beast of the sea, bigger than the largest galleon, with sucker-laden tentacles and a terrifying maw.
ast.target: 一头传奇的海兽，比最大的帆船还大，长有吸盘触手和恐怖巨口。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Kraken can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 海妖每回合可被GM聚光最多三次。照常花费恐惧来聚光他们。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the Kraken has 7 or fewer marked HP, they can make their standard attack against two targets within range.
ast.target: 当海妖已标记7点或更少生命值时，他们可以对范围内的两个目标进行标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to spew a line of boiling water at any number of targets in a line up to Far range. All targets must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or take 4d6+9 physical damage. If a target marks an Armor Slot to reduce the damage, they must also mark a Stress.
ast.target: 花费一点恐惧，向一条直线上远距离内的任意数量目标喷出一道沸水线。所有目标必须通过一次敏捷反应检定，否则受到4d6+9点物理伤害。如果目标标记一个护甲槽来减少伤害，他们还必须标记一点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Kraken makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当海妖对一名PC发起成功的攻击时，你获得一点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A towering immortal and incarnation of fate, cursed to only see bad outcomes.
ast.target: 一位高耸的不朽者，命运的化身，被诅咒只能看到糟糕的结果。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Oracle makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当神谕者发起成功的攻击时，远距离内的所有PC失去一点希望，你获得一点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a creature rolls a failure while within Very Far range of the Oracle, they must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 当一个生物在神谕者的极远距离范围内掷出失败时，他们必须标记一点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to present a target within Far range with a vision of their personal nightmare. The target must make a Knowledge Reaction Roll. On a failure, they lose all Hope and take 2d20+4 direct magic damage. On a success, they take half damage and lose a Hope.
ast.target: 消耗1点恐惧值，指定一个远距离范围内的目标，使其目睹其个人噩梦的幻象。目标必须进行一次知识反应检定。若失败，其失去所有希望值，并受到2d20+4点直接魔法伤害。若成功，则受到一半伤害，并失去1点希望值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per day, spend 2 Fear to summon 2d4 Tier 2 or below Minions relevant to one of the PC's personal nightmares. They appear at Close range relative to that PC.
ast.target: 每日一次，消耗2点恐惧值，召唤2d4个2级或以下的、与某位玩家角色个人噩梦相关的爪牙。它们出现在该玩家角色的近距离范围内。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Oracle sees a mortal creature, they instantly know one of their personal nightmares.
ast.target: 当神谕者看到一个凡人生物时，其立刻知晓该生物的一个个人噩梦。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Oracle marks HP from an attack within Very Close range, you can mark a Stress to knock the attacker back to Far range and deal 2d10+4 physical damage.
ast.target: 当神谕者因极近距离范围内的攻击而标记生命值时，你可以标记1点压力值，将攻击者击退至远距离范围，并对其造成2d10+4点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A chaotic mockery of life, constantly in flux.
ast.target: 一种混乱的生命仿制品，形态不断变化。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Abomination attacks, roll 2d4 and use the result as their attack modifier.
ast.target: 当畸变体攻击时，掷2d4，并将结果用作其攻击调整值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a target takes damage from the Abomination, they must make an Instinct Reaction Roll. On a failure, they gain disadvantage on their next action roll and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当目标受到畸变体造成的伤害时，其必须进行一次本能反应检定。若失败，其下一次行动检定获得劣势，且你获得1点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Abomination takes damage, reduce it by 1d20. If the Abomination marks 1 or fewer Hit Points from a successful attack against them, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当畸变体受到伤害时，减少1d20点伤害。如果畸变体因一次成功的攻击而标记1点或更少的生命值，你获得1点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A shifting, formless mass seemingly made of chromatic light.
ast.target: 一团不断变化、无定形的物质，似乎由彩色光芒构成。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC takes damage from the Corrupter, they lose a Hope.
ast.target: 当玩家角色受到腐化者造成的伤害时，其失去1点希望值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to spew partially digested portions of consumed realities at all targets within Close range. Targets must succeed on a Knowledge Reaction Roll or mark 2 Stress.
ast.target: 标记1点压力值，向近距离范围内的所有目标喷吐部分消化的现实碎片。目标必须成功通过一次知识反应检定，否则标记2点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A vaguely humanoid form stripped of memory and identity.
ast.target: 一个模糊的人形，被剥夺了记忆与身份。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Thrall is defeated when they take any damage. For every 13 damage a PC deals to the Thrall, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 奴仆在受到任何伤害时即被击败。玩家角色每对奴仆造成13点伤害，就额外击败攻击范围内一个该攻击能够命中的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to choose a target and spotlight all Outer Realm Thralls within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 11 physical damage each. Combine this damage.
ast.target: 消耗1点恐惧值，选择一个目标，并将聚光灯打在其近距离范围内的所有外域奴仆身上。这些爪牙移动至目标的近战范围，并进行一次共享攻击检定。若成功，每个爪牙造成11点物理伤害。将此伤害合并计算。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Enraged by their wounds, the dragon bursts into molten lava.
ast.target: 被伤口激怒，巨龙化为熔岩喷发。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Molten Scourge can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 熔岩灾祸在每个游戏主持人回合中最多可被聚光灯照射三次。照常消耗恐惧值来为其聚光。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Molten Scourge takes damage, roll a number of d6s equal to HP marked. For each result of 4 or higher, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当熔岩灾祸受到伤害时，掷等同于其标记的生命值数量的d6。每个结果为4或更高的骰子，你获得1点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, the target takes 4d8+1 physical damage, loses a Hope, and is knocked back to Close range. The Molten Scourge clears a Stress.
ast.target: 标记1点压力值，对极近距离范围内的一个目标进行攻击。若成功，目标受到4d8+1点物理伤害，失去1点希望值，并被击退至近距离范围。熔岩灾祸清除1点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Molten Scourge takes Severe damage from an attack within Very Close range, molten blood gushes from the wound and deals 2d10+4 direct physical damage to the attacker.
ast.target: 当熔岩灾祸因极近距离范围内的攻击而受到严重伤害时，熔岩血液从伤口涌出，对攻击者造成2d10+4点直接物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Molten Scourge marks their last HP, replace them with the Ashen Tyrant and immediately spotlight them.
ast.target: 当熔岩灾祸标记其最后一点生命值时，将其替换为灰烬暴君，并立即为其聚光。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A massive winged creature with obsidian scales and impossibly sharp claws.
ast.target: 一只巨大的有翼生物，覆盖着黑曜石鳞片，爪子锋利无比。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Obsidian Predator can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 黑曜石掠食者在每个游戏主持人回合中最多可被聚光灯照射两次。照常消耗恐惧值来为其聚光。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While flying, the Obsidian Predator gains a +3 bonus to their Difficulty.
ast.target: 飞行时，黑曜石掠食者的难度获得+3加值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Obsidian Predator is resistant to physical damage.
ast.target: 黑曜石掠食者对物理伤害有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Obsidian Predator succeeds against take 4d6+4 physical damage and are knocked back to Far range and Vulnerable until their next roll with Hope.
ast.target: 标记1点压力值，对近距离范围内的所有目标进行攻击。黑曜石掠食者命中的目标受到4d6+4点物理伤害，并被击退至远距离范围，且处于易伤状态，直到其下一次带有希望值的检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the Obsidian Predator is flying, mark a Stress to choose a point within Far range. Move to that point and make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Obsidian Predator succeeds against take 2d10+6 physical damage and must mark a Stress and lose a Hope.
ast.target: 如果黑曜石掠食者正在飞行，标记1点压力值，选择远距离范围内的一个点。移动至该点，并对极近距离范围内的所有目标进行攻击。黑曜石掠食者命中的目标受到2d10+6点物理伤害，且必须标记1点压力值并失去1点希望值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Obsidian Predator marks their last HP, replace them with the Molten Scourge and immediately spotlight them.
ast.target: 当黑曜石掠食者标记其最后一点生命值时，将其替换为熔岩灾祸，并立即为其聚光。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: No enemy has ever had the insolence to wound the dragon so. As the lava settles, it's ground to ash like the dragon's past foes.
ast.target: 从未有敌人胆敢如此伤害巨龙。随着熔岩冷却，它如同巨龙过去的敌人一样，被碾成了灰烬。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Ashen Tyrant can be spotlighted up to four times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 灰烬暴君在每个游戏主持人回合中最多可被聚光灯照射四次。照常消耗恐惧值来为其聚光。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress instead of spending a Fear to spotlight the Ashen Tyrant.
ast.target: 标记1点压力值，代替消耗恐惧值来为灰烬暴君聚光。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While flying, the Ashen Tyrant gains a +1 bonus to their Difficulty.
ast.target: 飞行时，灰烬暴君的难度获得+1加值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC rolls a failure while within Close range of the Ashen Tyrant, they lose a Hope and you gain a Fear. If the PC can't lose a Hope, they must mark a HP.
ast.target: 当玩家角色在灰烬暴君的近距离范围内掷出失败时，其失去1点希望值，且你获得1点恐惧值。如果该玩家角色无法失去希望值，则其必须标记1点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Ashen Tyrant succeeds against take 2d20+2 physical damage, are knocked back to Close range of where they were, and must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 标记1点压力值，对近距离范围内的所有目标进行攻击。灰烬暴君命中的目标受到2d20+2点物理伤害，被击退至其原位置的近距离范围内，且必须标记1点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to smash the ground and kick up ash within Far range. While within the ash cloud, a target has disadvantage on action rolls. The ash cloud clears the next time an adversary is spotlighted.
ast.target: 消耗1点恐惧值，重击地面，在远距离范围内扬起灰烬。在灰烬云中时，目标的行动检定获得劣势。当下一个对手被聚光照射时，灰烬云消散。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A towering, muscular zombie with magically infused strength and skill.
ast.target: 一个高大、肌肉发达的僵尸，拥有魔法灌注的力量与技巧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Zombie makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当僵尸进行一次成功的攻击时，远距离范围内的所有玩家角色失去1点希望值，且你获得1点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: PCs can't spend Hope to use features against the Zombie.
ast.target: 玩家角色无法消耗希望值来对僵尸使用特性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to make a standard attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Zombie succeeds against are Vulnerable until their next rest.
ast.target: 标记1点压力值，对极近距离范围内的所有目标进行一次标准攻击。僵尸命中的目标处于易伤状态，直到其下一次休息。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When another adversary deals damage to a target within Very Close range of the Zombie, you can spend a Fear to add the Zombie's standard attack damage to the damage roll.
ast.target: 当另一个对手对僵尸极近距离范围内的一个目标造成伤害时，你可以消耗1点恐惧值，将僵尸的标准攻击伤害加到伤害掷骰中。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A large pack of undead, still powerful despite their rotting flesh.
ast.target: 一大群亡灵，尽管肉体腐烂，但依然强大。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Legion has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 2d6+5 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当亡灵军团标记了其一半或更多的生命值时，其标准攻击改为造成2d6+5点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Legion has resistance to physical damage.
ast.target: 亡灵军团对物理伤害有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Legion can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 亡灵军团在每个游戏主持人回合中最多可被聚光灯照射两次。照常消耗恐惧值来为其聚光。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Legion takes Minor damage from an attack within Melee range, you can mark a Stress to make a standard attack with advantage against the attacker.
ast.target: 当亡灵军团因近战范围内的攻击而受到轻微伤害时，你可以标记1点压力值，对攻击者进行一次带有优势的标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A former druidic grove lying fallow and fully reclaimed by nature.
ast.target: 一片休耕的前德鲁伊林地，已被自然完全收回。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A Young Dryad, two Sylvan Soldiers, and a number of Minor Treants equal to the number of PCs appear to confront the party for their intrusion.
ast.target: 一位年轻的树精、两名森林士兵以及数量等同于玩家角色数量的小型树人出现，为队伍的闯入而对峙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to summon a Minor Chaos Elemental drawn to the echoes of violence and discord. They appear within Far range of a chosen PC and immediately take the spotlight.
ast.target: 消耗1点恐惧值，召唤一个被暴力与不和回响吸引而来的小型混沌元素。它出现在选定玩家角色的远距离范围内，并立即获得聚光照射。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An ambush is set to catch an unsuspecting party off-guard.
ast.target: 一场伏击已设下，意图让毫无防备的队伍措手不及。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Difficulty of this environment equals that of the adversary with the highest Difficulty.
ast.target: 此环境的难度等于难度最高的对手的难度。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The ambushers reveal themselves to the party, you gain 2 Fear, and the spotlight immediately shifts to one of the ambushing adversaries.
ast.target: 伏击者向队伍显露真身，你获得2点恐惧值，且聚光灯立即转移到其中一名伏击对手身上。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An ambush is set by the PCs to catch unsuspecting adversaries off-guard.
ast.target: 玩家角色设下伏击，以出其不意地捕捉毫无防备的敌人。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC starts the ambush on unsuspecting adversaries, you lose 2 Fear and the first attack roll a PC makes has advantage.
ast.target: 当玩家角色对毫无防备的敌人发动伏击时，你失去2点恐惧值，且玩家角色进行的第一次攻击掷骰具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The economic heart of the settlement, with local artisans, traveling merchants, and patrons across social classes.
ast.target: 定居点的经济中心，汇聚了本地工匠、旅行商人以及来自社会各阶层的顾客。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: PCs can gain advantage on a Presence Roll by offering a handful of gold as part of the interaction.
ast.target: 玩家角色可以通过在互动中提供一把金币，来获得一次存在感掷骰的优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Reveal to the PCs that one of the merchants has something they want or need, such as food from their home, a rare book, magical components, a dubious treasure map, or a magical key.
ast.target: 向玩家角色揭示，其中一位商人拥有他们想要或需要的东西，例如来自家乡的食物、一本稀有书籍、魔法材料、一张可疑的藏宝图，或是一把魔法钥匙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When one of the PCs splits from the group, the crowds shift and cut them off from the party.
ast.target: 当一名玩家角色与队伍分离时，人群会移动并切断他们与队伍的联系。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A steep, rocky cliffside tall enough to make traversal dangerous.
ast.target: 一处陡峭、岩石嶙峋的悬崖，高度足以使攀登变得危险。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Previous climbers left behind large metal rods that climbers can use to aid their ascent. If a PC using the pitons fails an action roll to climb, they can mark a Stress instead of ticking the countdown up.
ast.target: 之前的攀登者留下了大型金属杆，攀登者可以利用它们辅助攀登。如果使用岩钉的玩家角色在攀爬行动掷骰中失败，他们可以选择标记一点压力值，而不是增加倒计时。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to have a PC's handhold fail, plummeting them toward the ground. If they aren't saved on the next action, they must make a roll; tick up the countdown by 1, and they take 1d12 physical damage if the countdown is between 8 and 12, 2d12 between 4 and 7, and 3d12 at 3 or lower.
ast.target: 花费1点恐惧值，让一名玩家角色的支撑点失效，使其坠向地面。如果他们在下一次行动中未被救下，他们必须进行一次掷骰；倒计时增加1点，如果倒计时在8到12之间，他们受到1d12点物理伤害；在4到7之间，受到2d12点伤害；在3或更低时，受到3d12点伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A lively tavern that serves as the social hub for its town.
ast.target: 一家热闹的酒馆，是其所在城镇的社交中心。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A PC can perform one time for the guests by making a Presence Roll. On a success, they earn 1d4 handfuls of gold (2d4 if they critically succeed). On a failure, they mark a Stress.
ast.target: 玩家角色可以通过进行一次存在感掷骰，为客人们表演一次。成功时，他们获得1d4把金币（大成功则获得2d4把）。失败时，他们标记一点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Reveal a stranger concealing their identity, lurking in a shaded booth.
ast.target: 揭示一个隐藏身份、潜伏在阴暗隔间里的陌生人。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Introduce a significant NPC who wants to hire the party for something or who relates to a PC's background.
ast.target: 介绍一位重要的非玩家角色，他想要雇佣队伍做某事，或者与某位玩家角色的背景有关。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A small town on the outskirts of a nation or region, close to a dungeon, tombs, or other adventuring destinations.
ast.target: 一个位于国家或地区边缘的小镇，靠近地牢、古墓或其他冒险目的地。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An adventuring society maintains a chapterhouse here, where heroes meet to exchange news and rumors, drink to their imagined successes, and scheme to undermine their rivals.
ast.target: 一个冒险者协会在此设有分会所，英雄们在此交换新闻和传闻，为想象中的成功举杯，并策划如何削弱他们的对手。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Another adventuring party is here, seeking the same treasure or leads as the PCs.
ast.target: 另一支冒险队伍也在这里，寻求与玩家角色相同的宝藏或线索。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The PCs witness as agents of a local crime boss shake down a general goods store.
ast.target: 玩家角色目睹了当地犯罪头目的手下在一家杂货店进行敲诈勒索。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A swift-moving river without a bridge crossing, deep enough to sweep away most people.
ast.target: 一条水流湍急的河流，没有桥梁可供跨越，深度足以卷走大多数人。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Crossing the river requires the party to complete a Progress Countdown (4). A PC who rolls a failure with Fear is immediately targeted by the "Undertow" action without requiring a Fear to be spent on the feature.
ast.target: 渡河需要队伍完成一个进度倒计时（4）。如果一名玩家角色在带有恐惧的掷骰中失败，他们将立即被“暗流”行动锁定，无需为此特性花费恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to catch a PC in the undertow. They must make an Agility Reaction Roll. On a failure, they take 1d6+1 physical damage and are moved a Close distance down the river, becoming Vulnerable until they get out of the river. On a success, they must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 花费1点恐惧值，让一名玩家角色被暗流卷住。他们必须进行一次敏捷反应掷骰。失败时，他们受到1d6+1点物理伤害，并被向下游移动一个近距离单位，直到离开河流前一直处于易伤状态。成功时，他们必须标记一点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to summon a Glass Snake within Close range of a chosen PC. The Snake appears in or near the river and immediately takes the spotlight to use their "Spinning Serpent" action.
ast.target: 花费1点恐惧值，在一名选定玩家角色的近距离范围内召唤一条玻璃蛇。这条蛇出现在河流中或附近，并立即获得聚光灯，使用其“旋转蛇击”行动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A fallen cult assembles around a sigil of the defeated gods and a bonfire that burns a sickly shade of green.
ast.target: 一个陨落的邪教围绕着被击败神祇的符文和一堆燃烧着病态绿色火焰的篝火聚集。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Cultists dedicated this place to the Fallen Gods, and their foul influence seeps into it. Reduce the PCs' Hope Die to a d10 while in this environment. The desecration can be removed with a Progress Countdown (6).
ast.target: 邪教徒将此地献给了陨落之神，他们邪恶的影响渗透其中。在此环境中，将玩家角色的希望骰降为d10。可以通过一个进度倒计时（6）来消除这种亵渎。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the ritual's leader is targeted by an attack or spell, an ally within Very Close range of them can mark a Stress to be targeted by that attack or spell instead.
ast.target: 如果仪式的领导者被攻击或法术锁定，其极近范围内的盟友可以标记一点压力值，以代替他们成为该攻击或法术的目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A bustling yet well-kept temple that provides healing and hosts regular services, overseen by a priest or seraph.
ast.target: 一座繁忙而维护良好的神殿，提供治疗并定期举行仪式，由一位牧师或炽天使主持。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A PC who takes a rest in the Hallowed Temple automatically clears all HP.
ast.target: 在圣殿神殿中休息的玩家角色会自动清除所有生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per scene, each PC can mark a Stress to turn a result with Fear into a result with Hope.
ast.target: 每场一次，每位玩家角色可以标记一点压力值，将一次带有恐惧的结果转变为带有希望的结果。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the PCs have trespassed, blasphemed, or offended the clergy, you can spend a Fear to summon a High Seraph and 1d4 Bladed Guards within Close range of the senior priest to reinforce their will.
ast.target: 当玩家角色擅闯、亵渎或冒犯了神职人员时，你可以花费1点恐惧值，在高级牧师的近距离范围内召唤一位高阶炽天使和1d4名刃卫，以强化他们的意志。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An abandoned city populated by the restless spirits of eras past.
ast.target: 一座被过往时代不安灵魂占据的废弃城市。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Adversaries who appear here are of a ghostly form. They have resistance to physical damage and can mark a Stress to move up to Close range through solid objects.
ast.target: 在此出现的敌人呈幽灵形态。他们对物理伤害有抗性，并可以标记一点压力值，穿过固体物体移动至近距离范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Stony peaks that pierce the clouds, with a twisting path winding its way up and over through many switchbacks.
ast.target: 刺破云霄的石峰，一条蜿蜒的小路通过许多发夹弯盘旋而上。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the PCs enter the raptors' hunting grounds, two Giant Eagles appear at Very Far range of a chosen PC, identifying the PCs as likely prey.
ast.target: 当玩家角色进入猛禽的狩猎领地时，两只巨鹰出现在一名选定玩家角色的极远范围处，将玩家角色视为可能的猎物。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Countdown (Loop 4). When the PCs enter the mountain pass, activate the countdown. When it triggers, all characters traveling through the pass must succeed on a Strength Reaction Roll or mark a Stress. A PC wearing clothes appropriate for extreme cold gains advantage on these rolls.
ast.target: 倒计时（循环4）。当玩家角色进入山口时，激活倒计时。当倒计时触发时，所有穿越山口的角色必须成功通过一次力量反应掷骰，否则标记一点压力值。穿着适合极端寒冷衣物的玩家角色在这些掷骰中获得优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Thick indigo ash fills the air around a towering moss-covered tree that burns eternally with flames a sickly shade of blue.
ast.target: 浓密的靛蓝色灰烬弥漫在空气之中，围绕着一棵覆盖着苔藓、高耸入云的大树，树上永恒燃烧着病态的蓝色火焰。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC makes a Spellcast Roll, they must roll two Fear Dice and take the higher result.
ast.target: 当玩家角色进行施法掷骰时，他们必须掷两颗恐惧骰，并取较高的结果。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Warped animals wreathed in indigo flame trample through a point of your choice. All targets within Close range of that point must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 3d12+3 physical damage. Targets who succeed take half damage instead.
ast.target: 被靛蓝色火焰包裹的扭曲动物践踏过你选择的一个点。该点近距离范围内的所有目标必须进行一次敏捷反应掷骰。失败的目标受到3d12+3点物理伤害。成功的目标则受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An active siege with an attacking force fighting to gain entry to a fortified castle.
ast.target: 一场活跃的围城战，进攻方正奋力攻入一座设防的城堡。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A PC can find or recall a secret way into the castle with a successful Instinct or Knowledge Roll.
ast.target: 玩家角色可以通过一次成功的直觉或知识掷骰，找到或回忆起一条进入城堡的秘密通道。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Summon a Knight of the Realm, a number of Tier 3 Minions equal to the number of PCs, and two adversaries of your choice within Far range of a chosen PC as reinforcements. The Knight of the Realm immediately takes the spotlight.
ast.target: 在一名选定玩家角色的远距离范围内，召唤一位王国骑士、数量等于玩家角色数量的3级爪牙，以及你选择的两名敌人作为援军。王国骑士立即获得聚光灯。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A massive combat between two large groups of armed combatants.
ast.target: 两支大型武装战斗人员之间的一场大规模战斗。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Traversing a battlefield during an active combat is extremely dangerous. A PC must succeed on an Agility Roll to move at all, and can only go up to Close range on a success. If an adversary is within Melee range of them, they must mark a Stress to make an Agility Roll to move.
ast.target: 在活跃的战斗中穿越战场极其危险。玩家角色必须成功通过一次敏捷掷骰才能移动，且成功时最多只能移动一个近距离单位。如果一名敌人在其近战范围内，他们必须标记一点压力值才能进行敏捷掷骰以移动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The attacking force raises the stakes by lighting a fire, stealing a valuable asset, kidnapping an important person, or killing the populace.
ast.target: 进攻方通过纵火、偷窃贵重资产、绑架重要人物或杀害民众来提高赌注。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear as a mage from one side uses large-scale destructive magic. Pick a point on the battlefield within Very Far range of the mage. All targets within Close range of that point must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 3d12+8 magic damage and must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 花费1点恐惧值，让一方的一名法师使用大规模破坏性魔法。在法师的极远范围内选择一个点。该点近距离范围内的所有目标必须进行一次敏捷反应掷骰。失败的目标受到3d12+8点魔法伤害，并且必须标记一点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An otherworldly space where the laws of reality are unstable and dangerous.
ast.target: 一个异界空间，现实法则在此不稳定且危险。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Up is down, down is right, right is a stairway. Gravity and directionality themselves are in flux, and any attempt to move through this realm is an odyssey unto itself, requiring a Progress Countdown (8). On a failure, a PC must mark a Stress in addition to the roll's other consequences.
ast.target: 上即下，下即右，右即阶梯。重力和方向性本身都在不断变化，任何穿越此领域的尝试都是一次奥德赛之旅，需要一个进度倒计时（8）。失败时，玩家角色除了承受掷骰的其他后果外，还必须标记一点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: On a failure, they take 4d10 direct magic damage. On a success, they must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 失败时，他们受到4d10点直接魔法伤害。成功时，他们必须标记一点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: On a result with Fear, you can ask the PC to describe which of their fears the Chaos Realm evokes as a vision of reality unmakes and reconstitutes itself to the PC. The PC loses a Hope. If it is their last Hope, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 在带有恐惧的结果时，你可以要求玩家角色描述混沌领域唤起了他们哪种恐惧，作为现实解构并重组的幻象。该玩家角色失去1点希望值。如果这是他们最后一点希望值，你获得1点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A massive ritual designed to breach the gates of the Hallows Above and unseat the New Gods themselves.
ast.target: 一个旨在突破圣殿之门、推翻新神本身的大型仪式。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC critically succeeds, they can spend 2 Hope to refresh an ability normally limited by uses (such as once per rest, once per session).
ast.target: 当玩家角色大成功时，他们可以花费2点希望值，刷新一个通常受使用次数限制的能力（例如每休息一次、每场一次）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend 2 Fear to summon 1d4+2 Fallen Shock Troops that appear within Close range of the Usurper to assist their divine siege. Immediately spotlight the Shock Troops to use a "Group Attack" action.
ast.target: 花费2点恐惧值，召唤1d4+2名陨落突击兵，他们出现在篡位者的近距离范围内，协助其神圣围攻。立即让突击兵获得聚光灯，使用一次“群体攻击”行动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: On any failure with Fear against the Usurper, the PC must mark 1d4 Stress from the backlash of magical power.
ast.target: 在对抗篡位者的恐惧检定中失败时，角色必须因魔法力量的反噬而标记1d4点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dazzling mansion of a powerful empire, lavishly appointed with stolen treasures.
ast.target: 一座强大帝国的炫目宫殿，内部陈设奢华，堆满了掠夺来的珍宝。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While in the Imperial Court, a PC has disadvantage on Presence Rolls made to take actions that don't fit the imperial way of life or support the empire's dominance.
ast.target: 在帝国宫廷期间，角色在进行不符合帝国生活方式或支持帝国统治的行动时，其魅力检定处于劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to tick down a long-term countdown related to the empire's agenda by 1d4. If this triggers the countdown, a proclamation related to the agenda is announced at court as the plan is executed.
ast.target: 花费一点恐惧值，将与帝国议程相关的长期倒计时减少1d4。如果此操作触发了倒计时，则在计划执行时，一项与议程相关的公告将在宫廷中宣布。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: On a result with Fear, you can spend a Fear to have someone loyal to the empire overhear seditious talk within the court. A PC must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll to notice that the group has been overheard so they can try to intercept the witness before the PCs are exposed.
ast.target: 在带有恐惧的结果上，你可以花费一点恐惧值，让一名忠于帝国的人无意中听到宫廷内的煽动性言论。角色必须成功通过一次本能反应检定，才能注意到己方已被窃听，从而有机会在暴露前拦截证人。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A dusty crypt with a library, twisting corridors, and abundant sarcophagi; spattered with the blood of ill-fated invaders.
ast.target: 一座尘封的墓穴，内有藏书室、蜿蜒的走廊和众多石棺；四处溅满了不幸入侵者的鲜血。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A feature or action that clears HP requires spending a Hope to use. If it already costs Hope, a PC must spend an additional Hope.
ast.target: 任何能清除生命值的特性或行动都需要花费一点希望值才能使用。如果该行动本身已需花费希望值，则角色必须额外花费一点希望值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A PC can investigate the library and laboratory and make a Knowledge Roll to learn information related to arcana, local history, and the Necromancer's plans.
ast.target: 角色可以调查藏书室和实验室，并进行一次知识检定，以了解与奥秘、当地历史以及死灵法师计划相关的信息。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: All targets within Close range of a point you choose in this environment must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or take 4d8+8 physical damage from bone shrapnel as part of the ossuary detonates around them.
ast.target: 在此环境中，你所选点位近距离范围内的所有目标必须成功通过一次敏捷反应检定，否则将因部分骨骸炸裂而受到4d8+8点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per scene, roll a d4. Each undead within Far range of the Necromancer can clear HP and Stress equal to the result rolled. The undead can choose how that total number is divided between HP and Stress.
ast.target: 每场景一次，掷一个d4。死灵法师远距离范围内的每个亡灵可以清除等于掷骰结果的生命值和压力。亡灵可以自行决定如何在生命值和压力之间分配该总数。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to summon 1d6 Rotted Zombies, two Perfected Zombies, or a Zombie Legion, who appear at Close range of a chosen PC.
ast.target: 花费一点恐惧值，召唤1d6个腐烂僵尸、两个完美僵尸或一个僵尸军团，它们出现在选定角色的近距离范围内。
